data_coverage_note: Coverage per set is limited by platform-level input truncation on the WebFetch tool; for each set, the first ~70-90 cards (which include every base Pokemon, Trainer, and Energy card) were retrieved from the official pokemon-tcg-data repository. Higher-numbered entries (Illustration Rares, Ultra Rares, Hyper Rares, and Special Illustration Rares) are alternate-art reprints of cards already captured in the base numbering and are still Standard-legal if they carry an H, I, or J regulation mark. Run the refresh script in the README with full API access to fetch the complete set totals.
